policy.terms: Enable access to the latest Claude Fable 5 model from Anthropic. [Learn more about how GitHub Copilot serves Claude Fable 5](https://gh.io/copilot-claude-opus).

warning_text.data_retention: When Claude Fable 5 is used, Anthropic retains data, including prompts and outputs, to operate safety classifiers that detect harmful use. You can read more about Anthropic's data handling practices for this model under [Anthropic's Data retention practices for Mythos-class models](https://support.claude.com/en/articles/15425996-data-retention-practices-for-mythos-class-models).
